prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_transfer_request traveler_alpha)
(select_service_option traveler_alpha taxi_service_option)
(reserve_schedule_slot traveler_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(confirm_schedule_slot traveler_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(validate_voucher traveler_alpha voucher_code_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(assign_assistance_resource traveler_alpha transfer_assistant)
(redeem_voucher traveler_alpha transfer_assistant)
(release_assistance_resource traveler_alpha transfer_assistant)
(issue_travel_document traveler_alpha travel_document_alpha)
(verify_travel_document traveler_alpha travel_document_alpha)
(finalize_traveler_continuity traveler_alpha)
(bind_contingency_equipment_to_transfer traveler_alpha contingency_kit transfer_slot_alpha)
(deploy_backup_service_to_traveler traveler_alpha taxi_service_option contingency_kit)
(release_schedule_slot traveler_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(register_transfer_request inbound_leg_alpha)
(select_service_option inbound_leg_alpha coach_service_option)
(reserve_schedule_slot inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(mark_arrival_point_ready inbound_leg_alpha arrival_bay_a transfer_slot_alpha)
(confirm_schedule_slot inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(release_schedule_slot inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(assign_assistance_resource inbound_leg_alpha transfer_assistant)
(secure_inbound_arrival inbound_leg_alpha arrival_bay_a transfer_assistant)
(release_assistance_resource inbound_leg_alpha transfer_assistant)
(register_transfer_request outbound_leg_alpha)
(select_service_option outbound_leg_alpha shuttle_service_option)
(reserve_schedule_slot outbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(mark_departure_point_ready outbound_leg_alpha departure_bay_a transfer_slot_alpha)
(confirm_schedule_slot outbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(release_schedule_slot outbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(assign_assistance_resource outbound_leg_alpha transfer_assistant)
(secure_outbound_departure outbound_leg_alpha departure_bay_a transfer_assistant)
(release_assistance_resource outbound_leg_alpha transfer_assistant)
(allocate_vehicle_to_transfer inbound_leg_alpha outbound_leg_alpha arrival_bay_a departure_bay_a vehicle_alpha)
(reserve_schedule_slot inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(confirm_vehicle_arrival vehicle_alpha inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(release_schedule_slot inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(complete_inbound_leg_handover inbound_leg_alpha vehicle_alpha)
(complete_outbound_leg_handover outbound_leg_alpha vehicle_alpha)
(register_transfer_request traveler_beta)
(select_service_option traveler_beta taxi_service_option)
(reserve_schedule_slot traveler_beta transfer_slot_alpha)
(confirm_schedule_slot traveler_beta transfer_slot_alpha)
(assign_vehicle_assignment_token traveler_beta vehicle_assignment_token_alpha)
(issue_boarding_pass traveler_beta boarding_pass_beta vehicle_alpha)
(attach_boarding_pass_to_vehicle traveler_beta boarding_pass_beta vehicle_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(assign_assistance_resource traveler_beta transfer_assistant)
(process_traveler_check_in_standard traveler_beta vehicle_assignment_token_alpha transfer_assistant boarding_pass_beta vehicle_alpha)
(release_assistance_resource traveler_beta transfer_assistant)
(revoke_travel_document traveler_alpha travel_document_alpha)
(issue_travel_document traveler_beta travel_document_alpha)
(authorize_traveler_transfer_standard traveler_beta travel_document_alpha boarding_pass_beta vehicle_alpha)
(complete_traveler_transfer traveler_beta)
(reserve_schedule_slot inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(bind_contingency_equipment_to_transfer inbound_leg_alpha contingency_kit transfer_slot_alpha)
(deploy_backup_service_to_inbound_leg inbound_leg_alpha coach_service_option contingency_kit)
(release_schedule_slot inbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(reserve_schedule_slot outbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(bind_contingency_equipment_to_transfer outbound_leg_alpha contingency_kit transfer_slot_alpha)
(deploy_backup_service_to_outbound_leg outbound_leg_alpha shuttle_service_option contingency_kit)
(release_schedule_slot outbound_leg_alpha transfer_slot_alpha)
(reserve_schedule_slot traveler_beta transfer_slot_alpha)
(bind_contingency_equipment_to_transfer traveler_beta contingency_kit transfer_slot_alpha)
(deploy_backup_service_to_traveler traveler_beta taxi_service_option contingency_kit)
message.reasoning:
The problem is a planning problem in PDDL for a disruption-resilient transfer backup plan. I need to output only the executable plan as a sequence of ground PDDL actions, one per line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).


## Identifying the problem  
- The task focuses on creating a disruption-resilient transfer backup plan using PDDL.  
- The output must be a sequence of ground PDDL actions, each on a new line, in the format (action-name arg1 arg2 ...).

## Analyzing the goal  
- The goal is to restore continuity for inbound_leg_alpha, outbound_leg_alpha, traveler_alpha, and traveler_beta, achieving (transfer_entity_continuity_restored) for each.  
- This requires binding contingency equipment and deploying backup services to ensure continuity.  

## Examining required actions  
- Actions like bind_contingency_equipment_to_transfer need continuity_ready, schedule_slot_allocated, and contingency_equipment_available, setting transfer_entity_contingency_plan_bound.  
- Deploy_backup_service_to_inbound_leg/outbound_leg/traveler requires contingency_plan_bound and sets continuity_restored, releasing service_option and equipment.  

## Investigating continuity readiness  
- Continuity_ready is set by actions like complete_traveler_transfer or complete_inbound_leg_handover, which need conditions like inbound_leg_ready and vehicle_arrival_confirmed.  
- For legs, complete_inbound_leg_handover sets continuity_ready, while traveler actions involve additional steps like finalize_traveler_continuity.  

## Reviewing initial state and objects  
- Objects include legs (inbound_leg_alpha, outbound_leg_alpha), travelers (alpha, beta), and contingency assets like backup_shuttle, with voucher_code_alpha available but voucher_code_beta not.  
- Initial state lacks registration, suggesting transfer_requests need to be registered first to start the process.

## Investigating slot allocation  
- Slot allocation is critical for both inbound and outbound legs, but only one slot (transfer_slot_alpha) is available at a time.  
- For inbound legs, slot allocation must occur before marking arrival point ready, while outbound legs need slot allocation after releasing it from inbound.  

## Sequencing operations  
- Registering and selecting services (e.g., coach, shuttle) must precede slot reservation and point readiness for both legs.  
- Releasing the slot after inbound leg completion allows allocation for outbound, requiring careful sequencing to avoid conflicts.  

## Managing assistance resources  
- Assigning assistance (e.g., transfer_assistant) is required for securing arrivals, but only one assistance resource is available.  
- Releasing assistance after use is possible, enabling reassignment to subsequent outbound leg operations.  

## Handling vehicle allocation  
- Vehicle allocation for normal operations requires both legs ready, handover complete, and points ready, with vehicle availability.  
- Vehicle arrival confirmation needs slot allocation to the inbound leg, ensuring alignment with scheduling requirements.

## Extending operations sequence  
- After releasing assistance for the inbound leg, register and process the outbound leg, including reserving the slot and marking departure point ready.  
- Confirm the schedule slot for outbound, then release it, allowing reassignment of assistance for securing outbound departure, setting both legs ready and handover complete.  

## Managing vehicle allocation  
- With both legs ready and points confirmed, allocate vehicle_alpha to the transfer, linking arrival and departure points without buffering.  
- Confirm vehicle arrival by reusing the slot for inbound, completing the inbound leg handover and setting continuity readiness.  

## Processing traveler continuity  
- For traveler_alpha, register and select services like taxi, but slot allocation may conflict with inbound leg, requiring release after handover.  
- Ensure booking confirmation and vehicle allocation to process traveler continuity, aligning with linked legs and boarding passes.

## Handling slot and equipment allocation
- Slots are allocated for reserving, confirming, and attaching, and can be released afterward for reuse in later binding steps.
- Contingency equipment binding requires continuity readiness, slot allocation, and equipment availability, setting it as bound and linked, then unavailable.

## Managing service deployment
- Deploying backup services to legs or travelers requires the service to be allocated and equipment linked, restoring continuity and releasing service and equipment availability.
- Service options remain allocated even after deployment, allowing potential reuse for subsequent selections once availability is restored.

## Addressing service shortages
- With only three service options for four entities, sequential selection and deployment can reuse services, as deploying one releases availability for the next.
- Early selection sets allocation but deployment later restores availability, enabling the same service option to be selected again for additional entities.

## Extending Service Allocation  
- Travelers can use vehicles after allocation and confirmation, but service shortages persist with only three options for four entities.  
- Sequential selection and processing to continuity readiness for one entity can free a service, enabling reuse for the next, but conflicts arise with traveler dependencies.  

## Exploring Voucher Paths  
- The voucher path allows traveler continuity readiness without vehicle allocation, requiring booking confirmation, voucher validation, and travel document issuance.  
- For traveler_alpha, this path is viable with voucher_alpha available, potentially freeing a service option after full processing for reuse by traveler_beta.  

## Addressing Traveler Dependencies  
- Traveler_beta’s voucher_beta is linked but unavailable, blocking the voucher path, suggesting a vehicle-based path instead.  
- Processing traveler_alpha via voucher path first could release resources, allowing service reuse, but requires careful sequencing to manage slot and service availability.

## Examining Vehicle Requirements  
- All main paths for processing, including check-in and boarding, require vehicle allocation, as seen with boarding_cleared needing boarding_pass_issued and vehicle links.  
- The voucher path remains the only option for continuity readiness without vehicle allocation, focusing on validate, redeem, verify, and finalize steps.  

## Assessing Voucher Availability  
- Traveler_beta cannot use the voucher path since voucher_beta is linked but unavailable, with no actions to make it accessible.  
- Traveler_alpha can proceed with voucher_alpha, but sharing vouchers is limited by specific traveler-voucher code links and availability constraints.  

## Analyzing Leg Processing  
- Processing legs like inbound_leg and outbound_leg to continuity_ready typically requires two services, such as coach and shuttle, but cannot be done independently due to coupled handover requirements.  
- Complete handover for one leg, such as inbound, needs both legs ready, making sequential processing without vehicle allocation challenging.  

## Investigating Contingency Options  
- Contingency paths like allocate_vehicle_with_arrival_contingency require arrival_backup_ready and other readiness states, but still depend on outbound_handover_complete, maintaining coupling.  
- Dual contingency allocation buffers both legs but ultimately requires vehicle_arrival_confirmed for handover completion, limiting independent progress.

## Detailing Traveler Alpha's Voucher Path  
- Traveler Alpha uses a voucher path with taxi service, issuing travel documents before verification.  
- The sequence involves registering requests, reserving slots, and redeeming vouchers, with assistance resources releasable post-redeem.  

## Managing Resource Release  
- After finalizing Traveler Alpha’s continuity, contingency equipment binds and deploys, freeing the taxi and kit.  
- Schedule slots and assistance resources release post-processing, optimizing resource availability for subsequent tasks.  

## Processing Inbound Leg Alpha  
- Inbound leg processing starts with coach service, marking arrival points ready and securing handovers.  
- Assistance resources assign and release, ensuring readiness for vehicle allocation.  

## Handling Outbound Leg Alpha  
- Outbound leg uses shuttle service, marking departure points ready and securing departures.  
- Similar to inbound, assistance resources manage handovers, preparing for vehicle allocation.

## Refining Assistance Resource Management  
- Assistance resources release after voucher redemption for traveler_alpha, ensuring efficiency before processing legs.  
- For traveler_beta, assistance releases post-check-in, maintaining resource availability for subsequent tasks.  

## Detailing Deployment Prerequisites  
- Deploying backup services to legs doesn’t require transfer_entity_booking_confirmed, simplifying the process.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
